cot_signal.summary: Neutral speculative positioning due to synthetic index asset class.

evidence.content_preview: SMC: SH+BMS+RTO · SMS+BMS+RTO · Turtle Soup · AMD cycle

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The Boom 1000 Index is in a strong High Timeframe (HTF) bearish trend across MN1, W1, and D1. While the Medium Timeframe (MTF) has been in a bullish retracement, the Lower Timeframe (LTF) has shifted bearish on M15, M5, and M1, confirming a pro-trend reversal realigning with the dominant HTF bearish trend. We identify a high-quality M15 bearish setup of the variation SH+BMS+CHoCH+FVG+RTO (candidate ID: BOOM 1000 INDEX_SH_BMS_RTO_BEARISH_BEARISH_14361.8505_f14239ca). This setup features a stop hunt (SH) above 14390.167, followed by a bearish CHoCH and BMS at 14314.918, leaving behind a valid Bearish Order Block (14327.818 - 14395.883) and FVG (14365.246 - 14373.609). We place a LIMIT short entry at 14361.8505, with a stop loss at 14402.6895 (above the OB high). Our take profits target major structural liquidity pools at 14289.975 (TP1), 14174.103 (TP2), and 14070.305 (TP3), yielding an exceptional risk-to-reward ratio of 7.14.

htf_bias.notes: HTF trend is strongly bearish across MN1, W1, and D1 timeframes.

mtf_bias.notes: MTF has been bullish but LTF has shifted bearish, indicating a pro-trend reversal realigning with the HTF bearish trend.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup

stop_loss.reason: Placed above the M15 Bearish Order Block high of 14395.883 with a structural buffer to protect against stop hunts.

take_profits.basis: Targeting the nearest major M15/M5 swing low liquidity pool.
Targeting the secondary M15 swing low liquidity pool.
Targeting the major HTF swing low liquidity pool at the bottom of the current M30 dealing range.
